meta.title: WordPress Native APIs smoke test
meta.author: WordPress
meta.description: Verifies that a WordPress Playground runtime exposes the wp_native_apis PHP.wasm extension classes.

steps.data:
Text

' ); if ( ! $tag_processor->next_tag( array( 'tag_name' => 'p', 'class_name' => 'target' ) ) || 'P' !== $tag_processor->get_tag() ) { fail_native_api_smoke_test( 'WP_HTML_Native_Tag_Processor did not find the target paragraph.' ); } echo "WP_HTML_Native_Tag_Processor: ok\n"; $html_processor = WP_HTML_Native_Processor::create_fragment( '
Docs
' ); if ( ! is_object( $html_processor ) || ! $html_processor->next_tag( array( 'tag_name' => 'a' ) ) || 'A' !== $html_processor->get_tag() ) { fail_native_api_smoke_test( 'WP_HTML_Native_Processor did not find the link in a fragment.' ); } echo "WP_HTML_Native_Processor: ok\n"; $xml_class = 'WordPress\\XML\\NativeXMLProcessor'; $xml_processor = $xml_class::create_from_string( '' ); if ( ! is_object( $xml_processor ) || ! $xml_processor->next_tag( 'item' ) || 'item' !== $xml_processor->get_tag_local_name() ) { fail_native_api_smoke_test( 'NativeXMLProcessor did not find the item element.' ); } echo "WordPress\\XML\\NativeXMLProcessor: ok\n"; $url_class = 'WordPress\\DataLiberation\\URL\\NativeURLInTextProcessor'; $url_processor = new $url_class( 'Visit example.com/docs now.', 'https://wordpress.org' ); if ( ! $url_processor->next_url() || 'example.com/docs' !== $url_processor->get_raw_url() || $url_processor->had_protocol() ) { fail_native_api_smoke_test( 'NativeURLInTextProcessor did not find the bare-domain URL.' ); } echo "WordPress\\DataLiberation\\URL\\NativeURLInTextProcessor: ok\n"; echo "PASS: Native API extension classes are available.\n";
